source: Keepa Charts The Ultimate Amazon FBA Tutorial for 2026.txt @49:35 — 'the competitive price threshold seems to be $84.86 — once it gets above $84 it seems that Amazon pulls the buy box away'; used a $60 avg_price_90 (a typical winning-seller price band the video cites, e.g. $52.40-$54.61) against the $84 threshold price to test our spike detector (ratio 1.4 — right at/near our 1.5x trigger; check carefully). CORRECTION: 84/60=1.4 falls in the [1.15,1.5) caution band, not the >=1.5 spike trigger — first draft mis-called which side of the line this landed on.
